name: HiDrive
description: A closed-loop benchmark for high-level autonomous driving focusing on long-tail scenarios and high-level driving capabilities such as legal compliance, ethical reasoning, and emergency response.

inference_environment.description: CARLA UE5-based simulation with higher-fidelity rendering and lighting.

test_method: Closed-loop simulation evaluating 330 routes (about 150m each) covering 30 high-level ability categories.
